EmailTemplate.name: Premium Support - Renewal
EmailTemplate.subject: Options for Renewal
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
If you are unable to work and/or having payment issues for your policy, we have negotiated a premium support option for renewing our customers that means you can keep your cover in place.
We can still renew your cover but will delay your first instalment or lump sum payment by 60 days.
Please contact us on 01242 808 740 to discuss these options.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
